nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and planning assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I like to bounce ideas off of AI to help me collect my thoughts

nodes.label: AI as knowledge base query tool
nodes.grounding_span: ask plain-speak questions into a knowledge base and have AI parse the answer out

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: AI still makes too many mistakes and errors to be completely relied upon

nodes.label: Personal enjoyment and skill maintenance
nodes.label_negative: Delegation to AI for enjoyable tasks
nodes.grounding_span: There are things that I enjoy doing and want to stay current with

nodes.label: Workplace culture and AI adoption
nodes.label_negative: Resistance to AI due to unfamiliarity
nodes.grounding_span: I work with very tech savvy folks so I think we are probably more comfortable with the ever changing nature of technology

nodes.label: AI as time-saving efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as inefficient due to need for auditing
nodes.grounding_span: AI was able to locate it much more efficiently. That was a big time saver

nodes.label: Skill maintenance as hedge against over-reliance
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI leading to skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: over reliance can put you in a bad spot if you don't keep current on skills

nodes.label: Collaborative ideation and creativity
nodes.grounding_span: bounce ideas off of AI to help me collect my thoughts

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: AI is great at helping you glue together a bunch of thoughts or concepts into a cohesive plan

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for knowledge retrieval
nodes.grounding_span: AI is really good at extracting information from a knowledge base

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI reliability
nodes.grounding_span: AI still makes too many mistakes and errors to be completely relied upon

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for time-saving
nodes.grounding_span: AI was able to locate it much more efficiently. That was a big time saver

nodes.label: Ambivalent stance toward AI in skill areas
nodes.grounding_span: I know AI probably would be servcible but I'd have to audit the work and I enjoy doing stuff like that

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — feeds raw thoughts then fine-tunes
nodes.grounding_span: mostly me feeding the thoughts all at once and having it spit something out. I then will suggest fine tune adjustments

nodes.label: Skill preservation mindset — maintains hands-on practice despite AI capability
nodes.grounding_span: it's important to stay current. Having experience is needed
